## Feature or page to test

<!-- Describe the feature, page URL, or user flow that needs test coverage. -->

**URL:** https://www.cleanlisense.com/

## What should be verified

<!-- List the specific behaviors, states, or content to assert. Be as concrete as possible. -->

- [ ]
- [ ]
- [ ]

## Test type

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] `@smoke` — basic page load and title
- [ ] `@navigation` — links, routing, and menus
- [ ] `@forms` — form fields, validation, and accessibility
- [ ] `@functional` — business logic, CTAs, feature sections
- [ ] `@visual` — screenshot regression
- [ ] `@responsive` — layout at mobile, tablet, and desktop breakpoints

## Priority

- [ ] High — this is a critical user flow (e.g., pricing, sign-up CTA)
- [ ] Medium — good-to-have coverage
- [ ] Low — edge case or rarely-visited page

## Suggested page object

<!-- If you know which file should model this page, name it here -->

`src/pages/<name>.page.ts`
